current_external_style_surface: Top-level colors/spacing/shapes/typography/strings/darkTheme plus Material3 bridge.
top_level_token_audit: Basic global token injection exists but no component-level theme registry.
todo: Design PaletteComponentThemes and add it to PaletteTheme/PaletteMaterialTheme as the single top-level component override entry.
acceptance_criteria: Project can override at least button/textField/card/select styles once at app root without passing per-instance style params.

current_external_style_surface: PaletteColors has primary/onPrimary/border/surface/onSurface/hint/error/onError/success/warning; spacing/shapes/typography are minimal.
top_level_token_audit: Color coverage is useful but missing common library tokens for secondary text, disabled states, hover/pressed, elevated surfaces, dividers, overlays, shadows, info/danger aliases, inverse colors.
todo: Define a public token taxonomy: semantic colors, state colors, surface layers, text levels, border/divider, shadow/elevation, opacity, motion, size, radius, spacing, typography.
acceptance_criteria: Token names are documented with meaning and examples; component authors can map major style surfaces without inventing ad hoc constants.

current_external_style_surface: Many XxxDefaults expose local color functions or colors() builders; dimensions often constants.
top_level_token_audit: No consistent global-to-local precedence is documented in code/tests.
todo: Implement and document precedence: explicit component param > XxxDefaults param > component theme token > semantic token > controlled fallback.
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 representative components have tests proving explicit params still override top-level theme tokens.

current_external_style_surface: Defaults objects contain many Dp/sp/Float constants and composable color functions.
top_level_token_audit: No standard shape for component token classes.
todo: Create a component token pattern: immutable XxxTokens/XxxTheme with colors, sizes, typography, radius, border, elevation, motion only where they are major user-facing style surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: New components can follow a documented template; old components can be migrated incrementally without API breaks.

component_scope: PaletteColors, PaletteSpacing, PaletteShapes, PaletteTypography, component tokens
current_external_style_surface: PaletteColors is a class with manual equals/hashCode; users must construct whole token objects.
top_level_token_audit: Partial customization is not as ergonomic as mainstream theme overrides.
todo: Provide copy/derive helpers or data-class-like APIs for theme tokens while preserving binary/API expectations.
acceptance_criteria: User can change primary color or default radius by overriding only that field and keeping all other defaults.

current_external_style_surface: FormTokens and ComponentSize encode heights, padding, radius, font, border, motion.
top_level_token_audit: Hardcoded object/enum prevents top-level project density and size control.
todo: Move form field size/radius/padding/border/focus/motion values into top-level form/control tokens; keep old API as compatibility facade where needed.
acceptance_criteria: TextField/Select/Cascader/InputNumber/SearchBar can share one top-level control density theme.

current_external_style_surface: Material ColorScheme is derived from the limited PaletteColors set.
top_level_token_audit: Bridge is coarse and duplicates several Material slots from primary/surface.
todo: Expand mapping or allow top-level Material color overrides to be generated from richer Palette semantic tokens.
acceptance_criteria: Material3 components used by app and Palette components visually align after only Palette token overrides.

current_external_style_surface: Manual review currently needed to find raw Color/dp/sp style constants.
top_level_token_audit: No guardrail prevents new hardcoded major style values.
todo: Add a static audit task or convention test that flags major style constants in XxxDefaults not backed by theme tokens, with allowlist for algorithmic constants.
acceptance_criteria: CI fails or warns when a new component introduces unowned public style constants.

current_external_style_surface: Many public constants are likely used externally.
top_level_token_audit: Direct replacement could be source or binary breaking.
todo: Create migration rules: keep existing constants as deprecated aliases where public, add token-backed functions next to them, then remove in a major version only if needed.
acceptance_criteria: Existing demos/tests compile after each migration step; deprecations include replacement guidance.

current_external_style_surface: Theme usage exists in demo but no component-theme customization guide.
top_level_token_audit: Users cannot discover which top-level token controls which component style.
todo: Write a theming guide with examples for brand theme, compact density, rounded/sharp shapes, dark mode, and per-component overrides.
acceptance_criteria: Docs include a token-to-component matrix generated from this audit and kept current.

current_external_style_surface: Several derived colors exist as extensions; many alpha variants are in component files.
top_level_token_audit: Current tokens partially cover colors; disabled/hover/selected/background alpha variants are scattered.
todo: Promote repeated derived colors into semantic/state tokens: textSecondary, textDisabled, borderHover, borderFocus, bgDisabled, bgHover, bgSelected, surfaceElevated, overlay, divider, shadow.
acceptance_criteria: Components stop hardcoding repeated alpha formulas for major states; users can globally tune disabled/hover/selected appearance.

current_external_style_surface: Spacing only none/xs/s/m/l/xl; shapes small/medium/large; typography title/body/label.
top_level_token_audit: Does not cover common component sizes, control density, page spacing, overlay radius, compact/large variants.
todo: Extend tokens with density-aware component sizing, radius scale, typography scale, line heights, icon sizes and content padding aliases.
acceptance_criteria: Button/Form/List/Table/Menu can derive height/padding/font/radius from shared top-level sizing tokens.

current_external_style_surface: AnimationDuration, Elevation, DisabledAlpha, OverlayAlpha appear in components.
top_level_token_audit: No top-level motion/elevation/opacity tokens.
todo: Add PaletteMotion, PaletteElevation and PaletteOpacity tokens for common durations, easing labels, shadow/elevation levels, disabled/scrim/hover opacity.
acceptance_criteria: Toast/Dialog/Drawer/Menu/Switch/Segmented/Carousel animation and elevation can be globally adjusted.

current_external_style_surface: BorderContainer exposes width/height/border/corner/padding/colors; layout row has no style surface.
top_level_token_audit: BorderContainer color uses PaletteDefaults but size/radius are hardcoded.
todo: Add foundation/control container tokens for height, width policy, border width, radius, padding; keep layout utilities token-free unless they render style.
acceptance_criteria: BorderContainer can be aligned with TextField density from top-level control tokens.

current_external_style_surface: PText uses LocalTextStyle/LocalContentColor; TextDefaults reads PaletteTheme; Screen has ScreenColors.
top_level_token_audit: Text is mostly covered; Screen color covered but background/content variants are minimal.
todo: Add top-level text roles and screen/surface tokens: primary/secondary/tertiary/disabled/inverse text, page background, app background, elevated surface.
acceptance_criteria: Changing text hierarchy and app background at root affects PText/Screen and components using text roles.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: type, size, width, disabled/loading; colors implicit; size enum carries padding/font/radius.
top_level_token_audit: Colors partly tokenized; size, padding, radius, width, disabled alpha are hardcoded; danger/plain contain Color.Black alpha.
todo: Add ButtonTokens for variants primary/danger/plain, content/container/border/hover/pressed/disabled, sizes, padding, font, radius, loading spacing, default width.
acceptance_criteria: All button visual defaults are controlled by PaletteTheme.componentThemes.button; existing ButtonSize remains as compatibility facade.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes colors() builder and color().
top_level_token_audit: Colors are tokenized through PaletteTheme but no top-level checkbox-specific tokens; dimensions/interactions need audit.
todo: Add CheckboxTokens for checked/unchecked/checkmark/disabled/focus/hover colors, size, stroke, radius, animation.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme can make all checkboxes square/rounded and tune hover/focus colors without per-instance colors().

current_external_style_surface: External surface appears through Defaults colors and label/description sizing.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; padding/radius/icon/font/disabled alpha are hardcoded.
todo: Add RadioTokens for checked/unchecked/label/description colors, item padding, radius, icon size, typography, disabled alpha.
acceptance_criteria: Radio can follow global compact/comfortable density and text hierarchy.

current_external_style_surface: External surface uses checked/unchecked/thumb/disabled colors and fixed track metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; geometry, radius, thumb offsets, alpha and motion mostly hardcoded/FormTokens.
todo: Add SwitchTokens for track/thumb colors by state, width/height/thumb/offset/radius, disabled alpha, motion.
acceptance_criteria: Global switch size and track shape can be changed from top-level theme.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes progress/track/thumb/rate colors and size constants.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; star/track/thumb/label/stroke/font metrics are constants.
todo: Add SliderTokens and RateTokens for active/inactive/disabled colors, thumb/track/star sizes, label typography, shadow, spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Compact and large control themes change sliders/rates consistently.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes pressed/selected colors, padding, radius, spacing, disabled alpha.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized but component-state containers are alpha formulas; dimensions/motion hardcoded.
todo: Add ToggleTokens and SegmentedTokens for state colors, group spacing, item padding, radius, disabled alpha, indicator motion.
acceptance_criteria: Top-level theme controls pill vs rectangular segmented/toggle groups.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: size, status, placeholder/icons/prefix/suffix/clearable/count; colors() exists for basic colors.
top_level_token_audit: Color coverage is decent; height/font from ComponentSize; border/radius/FormTokens partly hardcoded; TextArea/Password should share same tokens.
todo: Add TextFieldTokens for text/placeholder/container/border/focus/hover/error/success/warning/disabled/cursor/count colors, size variants, radius, padding, icon sizes, shadow, motion.
acceptance_criteria: All text field variants respond to one top-level form control theme.

component_scope: Select, Autocomplete, Cascader, CascaderPanel, TreeSelect, Mentions
current_external_style_surface: External surfaces include colors() on Select/Cascader/TreeSelect and Defaults color functions for others.
top_level_token_audit: Colors mostly tokenized; dropdown widths/heights/item height/padding/radius/font/arrow/icon alpha hardcoded; no shared dropdown/control token.
todo: Add SelectLikeTokens or per-component tokens sharing dropdown container/item/selected/hover/disabled/search/popup metrics and colors.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme changes dropdown item height, hover color, selected background, radius and typography across select-like components.

current_external_style_surface: External surface mostly value/status/placeholder; defaults expose text/placeholder/invalid and calendar metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Date/time input colors tokenized; calendar cell/header/selected/today metrics hardcoded.
todo: Add DateTimeTokens and CalendarTokens for input colors, calendar cell sizes, typography, selected/today/disabled colors, radius, spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Calendar and picker popup visuals can be tuned globally without editing component call sites.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes value/limits/search actions; Defaults define button/search/OTP cell colors and metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; width, button width, cell size, font, radius, icon sizes, disabled alpha hardcoded.
todo: Add InputNumberTokens, InputOtpTokens and SearchBarTokens for major colors, dimensions, typography, radius, icon/button metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Project can globally align numeric, OTP and search controls with form density.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes layout/form item behavior; defaults include item spacing, label width, label/helper font/color.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized but spacing/width/font hardcoded.
todo: Add FormTokens under top-level theme for item spacing, label width, label/input/helper gap, label/helper typography, required/error/help colors.
acceptance_criteria: Changing form density at root updates label spacing and helper typography consistently.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes items/selection and context menu provider; defaults include selected colors and menu/item metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; dimensions/radius/elevation/font/motion hardcoded.
todo: Add MenuTokens and CommandPaletteTokens for item colors/states, padding, radius, width, height, typography, elevation, motion.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme can make menus compact and adjust selected/hover states across Menu/ContextMenu/CommandPalette.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes active/current/done colors and item dimensions.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; padding/indicator/dot/line/title height/spacing hardcoded.
todo: Add navigation tokens for tab item padding/indicator, breadcrumb text/current/separator colors, step dot/line/status colors, collapse header/content spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Navigation components inherit top-level density and state colors.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: ToolbarColors builder; PageHeader default background/title/subtitle/back colors and metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; height/font/icon/padding/spacing hardcoded.
todo: Add AppBar/PageHeader tokens for container/content colors, height, title/subtitle typography, icon size, padding, back/action spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Global app chrome can be branded from root theme.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: variant, onClick, CardColors; radius/padding/elevation/border constants.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; radius/padding/elevation/border not top-level controllable.
todo: Add CardTokens for elevated/filled/outlined container/content/border colors, radius, content padding, elevation, border width.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme can switch cards to sharp/flat/outlined-heavy style without per-card params.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: TableColors builder, row/header sizes; DataGrid defaults for header/row/cell colors.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; row/header heights, padding, divider thickness, selection colors partly alpha formulas.
todo: Add TableTokens/DataGridTokens for header/row/cell colors, selected/hover states, heights, padding, divider, typography.
acceptance_criteria: Compact/comfortable table density and selected row color can be set at theme root.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: item/divider/label/content colors and layout constants.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; item height, row height, label width, padding, divider thickness hardcoded.
todo: Add ListTokens and DescriptionsTokens for item/row dimensions, divider, label/content colors, padding, typography.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme adjusts information density for list-like displays.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: tag variant/size/color, badge size/color, avatar size/background/text.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; TagSize/AvatarSize/Badge sizes/radius/padding hardcoded; custom color derivation local.
todo: Add TagTokens, BadgeTokens, AvatarTokens for semantic variants, size scale, radius, close icon size, text/icon colors, custom-color derivation alpha.
acceptance_criteria: Global theme controls chip pill shape, badge scale and avatar sizes.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: status/type and semantic colors; defaults include icon sizes, typography, spacing.
top_level_token_audit: Most semantic colors tokenized; some trend colors are raw Color; dimensions/font/spacing hardcoded.
todo: Add FeedbackDisplayTokens for result/empty/alert/statistic colors, typography, icon sizes, spacing, radius, border.
acceptance_criteria: Status display components share brand semantic colors and typography from root theme.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: message type/content/duration; defaults include container/text/accent colors and size/motion constants.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized but container alpha, dimensions, radius, icon size, motion and typography hardcoded.
todo: Add FeedbackOverlayTokens for message/notification/toast container, text/accent/border colors by type, width constraints, padding, radius, icon sizes, motion, elevation.
acceptance_criteria: Global theme changes toast/message/notification style without altering emitter APIs.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes visibility/actions/content; defaults define colors and layout metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; overlay alpha, radius, padding, dimensions, divider, draggable line, button typography, motion/elevation hardcoded.
todo: Add OverlayTokens and component tokens for modal containers, scrim, radius, padding, width, divider, drag handle, title/content/action typography, motion/elevation.
acceptance_criteria: A project can globally create square modals, custom scrim opacity and compact sheets.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes content/placement; defaults expose container/text/border colors and dimensions.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized but radius, padding, elevation, max width, offset, typography and motion hardcoded.
todo: Add FloatingLayerTokens for surface/text/border colors, radius, padding, offset, arrow/anchor metrics where relevant, elevation, typography, motion.
acceptance_criteria: All floating help/confirm/tour surfaces visually align from root theme.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes progress/loading type; defaults expose colors and size metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; linear/circle sizes, stroke, skeleton sizes/radius, loading dot/stroke/platform sizes hardcoded.
todo: Add ProgressTokens, LoadingTokens and SkeletonTokens for colors, sizes, stroke widths, radius, typography, animation duration.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme can tune indicator size/thickness and skeleton shape consistently.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes timeline item color override and status.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; dot/line sizes and spacings hardcoded.
todo: Add TimelineTokens for dot/line/status colors, dot/line sizes, content gap, item spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Timeline and steps share status colors and density from theme.

current_external_style_surface: External surfaces focus on data behavior; defaults expose item colors, sizes, padding and typography.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; panel sizes, item height, indent, padding, font, overscan/threshold partially algorithmic.
todo: Add tokens for visual density/colors for Transfer, Tree, Sortable, VirtualList and InfiniteScroll; keep algorithmic overscan/threshold explicit unless style-facing.
acceptance_criteria: List/tree/transfer components can be compacted globally while behavior constants remain explicit.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes image painter/content, carousel items, color selection; defaults expose colors/dimensions.
top_level_token_audit: Carousel colors tokenized; image shape hardcoded; colorpicker metrics hardcoded; colorpicker hue domain should stay algorithmic.
todo: Add CarouselTokens for indicators/arrows, ImageTokens for shape/background, ColorPickerTokens for panel/control dimensions/radius/thumb/preset spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Visual media components can match app radius/density without changing content APIs.

current_external_style_surface: External surface includes value/type; defaults expose size/background/content/watermark color/font/gap.
top_level_token_audit: QRCode/Barcode black/white defaults are not theme-controlled by default; some may intentionally remain explicit for scannability.
todo: Define which visual utility defaults are themeable; add tokens for watermark text/gap/alpha and optional QR/Barcode foreground/background with safe defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Utility defaults remain scannable but projects can globally theme watermark and explicitly opt into code colors.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: grid columns/gutter, space size/direction, affix offset/zIndex.
top_level_token_audit: Space defaults are hardcoded; grid columns may be structural; affix zIndex is style/platform-like.
todo: Add layout tokens for common spacing presets and z-index layers; keep grid column count as structural default unless product requirement says themeable.
acceptance_criteria: Space component reads Palette spacing scale and affix uses z-index layer token.

current_external_style_surface: External surface: visibility/click/actions; defaults include size/icon/radius/elevation/colors/text metrics.
top_level_token_audit: Colors tokenized; dimensions/radius/elevation/font hardcoded.
todo: Add FloatingActionTokens for container/icon/text colors, sizes, radius, elevation, label padding/font, visibility threshold if considered product style.
acceptance_criteria: Root theme can align floating action buttons with button/card radius and elevation.

component_scope: ComponentSize enum consumers: TextField, Badge, Rate, etc.
current_external_style_surface: Size enum owns height/font/icon/padding/radius.
top_level_token_audit: Enum constants are not top-level controllable and conflict with project density themes.
todo: Introduce token-backed component size scale and adapt ComponentSize helpers to read current theme where composable context allows.
acceptance_criteria: Small/Medium/Large map to project-defined density values while preserving enum usage.

current_external_style_surface: Common formulas include primary.copy(0.12f), onSurface.copy(0.6f), border.copy(0.5f), Color.Black.copy(...).
top_level_token_audit: Alpha values are style decisions but scattered across components.
todo: Centralize state opacity tokens and derived semantic colors for selected, hover, disabled, subtle text, elevated overlay and danger/plain button backgrounds.
acceptance_criteria: A global opacity tweak changes selected/disabled/subtle surfaces consistently.

current_external_style_surface: Some components expose colors() builders; many expose only Defaults constants; dimensions are rarely parameterized.
top_level_token_audit: No matrix of what should be publicly adjustable per component.
todo: For each component, define the intended public style surface: colors object, size enum/token, variant, shape/radius, typography, elevation, motion; document what remains internal.
acceptance_criteria: Reviewers can reject over-exposed internal knobs and under-tokenized major style surfaces using the matrix.

current_external_style_surface: Existing tests cover behavior but not systematically global theme overrides.
top_level_token_audit: No assurance that top-level token changes propagate.
todo: Add tests for Button, TextField, Select, Card, Table, Dialog, Message, Tag, Screen verifying top-level token override and explicit param precedence.
acceptance_criteria: Theme override test suite fails if a component bypasses top-level tokens for major style surfaces.

current_external_style_surface: Dark mode uses PaletteColors.dark and local if branches.
top_level_token_audit: Many state colors are implicit alpha formulas.
todo: Add regression tests for dark/light, disabled, hover, focus, selected, error/warning/success using token overrides where testable.
acceptance_criteria: State style behavior stays stable during token migration.

current_external_style_surface: Top-level exports already alias many Defaults and tokens.
top_level_token_audit: New token types will require exports and migration guidance.
todo: Add token exports to Palette.kt, deprecation notes for old constants, and changelog entries grouped by non-breaking vs breaking changes.
acceptance_criteria: Library users can migrate from per-component defaults to top-level theme tokens with clear steps.
